Product Description: In 1920, Walter and Cordelia Knott began selling fresh produce, berries and preserves, from a roadside berry stand in Buena Park, California. Their family business earned a place in history in 1932 when Walter Knott cultivated a luscious new fruit - the boysenberry. The farm that started it all became a family amusement park that delights millions. The Knott family is pleased to extend their tradition of quality to include premium shortbread cookies. Richly flavorful, these classic favorites are prepared using popular Knott's Berry Farm fruit fillings.

Pour 1 1/4 cups of freshly boiled water over the tea itself. Steep for 5 minutes. Fill a serving pitcher with 1/4 cold water. catalog_content:
Item Name: Food to Live Organic Puffed Quinoa, 4 Ounces – Crispy White Quinoa Pop. Non-GMO, Vegan, Kosher, Bulk. Perfect for Breakfast Cereal, Baking, Salads, and Snacks. Good Source of Fiber and Protein.
Bullet Point 1: ✔️GREAT WAY TO ENJOY QUINOA: Do you love popcorn? Then you’ll love Organic Puffed Quinoa, which is popcorn made from delicious and nutritious pseudo-grain - quinoa
Bullet Point 2: ✔️FULL OF NUTRIENTS: Organic Quinoa Puffs are packed with essential minerals, like iron and calcium.
Bullet Point 3: ✔️EASY PLANT PROTEIN SOURCE: Organic Crispy Quinoa Puffs make a tasty snack that gives you a boost of plant protein and fiber.
Bullet Point 4: ✔️CAN BE EATEN RAW: You can eat Organic Puffed Quinoa right from the bag. No need to waste time on cooking.
Bullet Point 5: ✔️DELICIOUS AND VERSATILE: Organic Unsweetened Puffed Quinoa can become your morning cereal or you can add it to fruit and veggie salads, or even use it in baking.
Product Description: By now everyone knows that quinoa is an excellent, delicious, and highly nutritious wholegrain substitute, and so is Organic Puffed Quinoa. This type of the pseudo-grain in nature doesn’t contain gluten, and the puffs can be eaten raw as a snack whenever you need an energy boost. Organic Quinoa Puffs are made by heating up regular quinoa seeds until they pop. Therefore, Organic Puffed Quinoa is, in essence, quinoa popcorn. This type of processing means that you can eat it raw. Also, Organic Crispy Quinoa Puffs retain the majority of nutrients this pseud-grain is famous for. Organic Unsweetened Puffed Quinoa is a rich source of plant protein and fiber. It also contains large quantities of essential minerals, including iron and calcium. Organic Puffed Quinoa Uses for Cooking Organic Quinoa Puffs have a pleasant nutty flavor and can be eaten right from the pack as a snack. Another great idea is to combine it with yogurt or milk. You can either add puffs to and/or use them as a substitute for your morning cereal. Organic Crispy Quinoa Puffs will also add some nice texture and protein to vegetable and fruit salads. In addition, you can use them when baking muffins or making homemade granola. Organic Unsweetened Puffed Quinoa combines well with fruits, vegetables, any type of milk, yogurt, and honey. Buying Organic Quinoa Puffs in Bulk: Storage Tips You can enjoy Organic Crispy Quinoa Puffs for many months as long as you ensure it stays dry in an airtight container. You don’t need to freeze or refrigerate them. Keeping Organic Puffed Quinoa in a cool dark pantry will be enough to ensure long shelf-life of the product. The most important rule is to keep humidity at a minimum.
Value: 4.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Organic, gluten-free, and non-GMO product positioned as a healthy, nutrient-rich snack and ingredient. Packaging emphasizes natural and organic credentials, with certifications visible. Mid-tier pricing likely due to organic sourcing and health-focused marketing. Resealable bag suggests convenience and freshness retention.
